mouth_throat.text: Ulcer of tongue, with indurated edges. Speech difficult. Power of speech lost but intelligence intact

face.text: Severe neuralgia in temporal region, recurring daily at same hour. Pain in orbital and supra-maxillary region, with screaming and loss of consciousness

respiratory.text: Cough prevents sleep; respiration weak; cannot take deep breath

keynotes.text: color="#800000">KALIUM CYANATUM Potassium Cyanide (KALI CYANATUM) Sudden sinking sensation. Cancer of tongue and agonizing neuralgia have been benefited by this drug. Sick headache; sciatica; epilepsy.
